{% extends "!layout.html" %} {# GitHub Pages has no Read the Docs language flyout, so provide an EN <-> KO toggle at the top of the sidebar. The two trees are built to sibling /en/ and /ko/ paths with identical page names, so the counterpart of the current page is lang_other_prefix + pagename + '.html'. The toggle always shows both labels in the same order (한국어 then English); the current language is marked active and the other is the switch button, with a divider below. Suppressed on RTD (which has its own language flyout) via the html_context gate in conf.py. #} {% block menu %} {% if lang_current %}

Language / 언어

{% if lang_current == 'ko' %} 한국어 English {% else %} 한국어 English {% endif %}
{% endif %} {{ super() }} {% endblock %}
